human_summary: Wave 1 + Wave 2 done (12 features shipped). MoodPicker, Bottom Sheet, Quick Log, haptics, save ripple, Space shortcut all live. AUTOPILOT system designed with 9-person team review. App: 384KB JS, 114KB gzip, zero errors.
next_tasks: wave1-fab-weight: FAB font weight changes with practice hours (20min)
wave3-visual-grammar: Document how data maps to visual properties (45min)
wave3-temporal-resonance: Data model for mood, energy, schedule fields (60min)
wave4-circadian-glass: Warm/cool tint based on time of day (30min)
wave4-ink-saturation: Text darkness increases with practice depth (30min)

steps: Verify key elements exist: hero stat text, tab bar with 4 tabs, FAB visible
No React errors in console (Vite websocket errors are OK)
build_gate.on_failure: git stash (save hash in stash_archive), log failure, move to next_task

bundle_budget.on_exceeded: Code-split the new feature or reject it. Log in session_log.

panic_recovery.json_parse_fails: Run git log -1 --format=%H, set status to clean, start fresh
panic_recovery.build_fails: git stash, save stash ref to stash_archive, move to next_task
panic_recovery.merge_conflicts: git checkout --theirs, rebuild, note in session_log
panic_recovery.dirty_state_unclear: git stash, save ref to stash_archive, set status to clean
